text: i have ordered a couple of times here and sometimes their coffee is good but on occasion you get a cup of milk with watered down coffee on one occasion i asked for a caramel macchiato and it tasted like milk with caramel no coffee whatsoever and i was disappointed because i love starbucks but overall it s a good way to grab a quick coffee if your on the go or if you re late and the next time i might ask for an extra shot in my macchiato happy eating

i opened this review like oh this will be an easy up as i thought of my quick trip but actually the layout of this location is can i cuss it s enough to not go back actually i ve been inside this location at least x and the service cleanliness speed and atmosphere were fine during peak hours you can t even get into the parking lot because it s a narrow angled one way drive around there s not enough room inside of their parking lot to accommodate the waiting cars so they sit in the street causing a traffic jam there s other traffic from the other businesses in the suite it s the most frustrating thing you can t even get inside of the lot to park to order inside or grab your pickup items i had actually mobile ordered and was almost involved in an accident trying to get inside my order was sitting at the station waiting for me

this is one of my go to starbucks places but it s just an ok location they re always constantly busy the drive thru wraps around the building almost every time i m there stars because they can actually make the drinks so if you can wait for good drinks deff come here if not just go to the mall or down the street to target

this is a pretty typical starbucks i don t go here very often but when i do the drinks are always made exactly how i expect them to be made the employees are always nice and chat a little bit at the window while waiting for the drink to be done or payment to go through the patio is decent no complaints on these things at all where there is a complaint however is that this location is very small and the parking lot is a terrible joke it s on a very busy section of broadway where many different commuters pass all day long it gets super busy it s not set up for super busy the drive thru line is usually jammed packed and flowing out onto broadway causing a major nightmare for busy traffic it actually is dangerous at times people will flat out stay in a traffic lane just to stay in that damned drive thru line there s very little parking so even if people weren t lazy as can be there s still a hassle there i wish they would redesign this location somehow to make the busy line flow better or at least to get it off of broadway for safety reasons

who doesn t love starbucks at this location it s a hit or a miss they are always busy and you never know if the person at the window is gonna be nice or rude they do have the most up beat nice man working the window sometimes but there are these two ladies who are just rude like here is your coffee now leave and basically doesn t care if your order is correct or not but i still go anyway bc it s close to home

not the easiest starbucks to get to because of but other than that it s pretty much your typical starbucks inside during our visit i think the cashier was in training as he seemed to be struggling with the orders but other than that no major issues my order came out quickly and correctly there is no drive thru at this location

this is a pretty crappy starbucks as far as starbuck shops go the outside is a orange red color that is atrocious to look at i was trying to find the place after driving off the i expected a shop with the starbuck colors of green and pale yellow the location of the store is crowded with little stores and has lots of traffic it is not a restful place there s the subliminal fear that at any moment an early model sedan will come crashing through the windows into the area where people drink coffee well that s how i felt whoever decorated the store didn t go out of their way to overcome that ugly look of asphalt and parked cars maybe it doesn t matter they have a good business and the coffee is good but if you read those starbuck books by schultz you d get the idea that just because all the other stores are scary drab and dreary doesn t mean starbucks has to be oh well grabbed the coffee and the calorie fruit bar and took off

ehh this starbucks is ok i came here mid afternoon on a saturday and the place was packed waited in line for at least minutes to order and then another for my drink luckily my drink was prepared well and correctly the service was average nothing to complain about but nothing spectacular the barista making the drinks was disheveled in appearance and had liquid all over the front of his apron granted i get that spills happen but his apron was gross he should have changed to another one if he was going to continue making drinks overall average experience this place seems to have pretty good reviews so perhaps i caught it at a bad time
ok drink from the drive through they were a bit short at the window but the drink was ok will go again because it is soooo convenient of a location

this starbucks was okay it was crowded but i was still able to get my work done i ordered a hot chocolate with whipped cream and it was delicious can t really go wrong with that i was there until closing and towards the end of the night the staff was a little loud behind the counter i do understand that it s the end of the night but i feel like starbucks is supposed to be a semi tranquil place to get stuff done i put my headphones in and it was fine but i don t think i should ve had to do that everything else about this starbucks is just like the rest can t really go too wrong with a starbucks parking is crazy though definitely not enough for the amount of people that go here

this starbucks is my nd least favorite the least is on hillsborough at i because it s smaller than most and it s located in a small plaza at a very busy intersection most times i m driving west on east bay so i d have to do a u turn at the lights then squeeze into one of the tight parking spaces or drive through the small and narrow parking area to get to the back for the drive thru inside is smaller than most too there are a few tables and seats but i don t recall a community table i believe there s just restroom for male and female and the door is right across from the registers i generally don t like to sit near the restrooms and would like to see it out of sight there s a small patio area in front that i rarely sit in because it s next to the drive thru so there s always cars driving by the busy intersection of east bay and starkey isn t much to look at and most times it s too hot and humid in florida most times the baristas were just okay not super friendly or talkative one time i asked for no ice with my iced drink but i was given ice but most times my drinks were made perfectly i really only stop by this starbucks because it s convenient definitely not one where i d want to hang out simply because the parking is just too small sorry

small location hidden in the first floor of the canal shops there was a small line when we arrived but it took a bit to get or drink they don t have seating in the store but they re a couple of tables right outside it in the mall they were all packed so we waited for one to open up since it s a smaller location they have a smaller selection of options in the cold case and in the shelves for merchandise they didn t have the you are here mugs at this location when we went side note we picked up an uber from here and they couldn t map this location so we had to pin point the shops fyi overall b okay stop but not the best in the quarter for the chain

i had started this review differently and was planning to go on a rant about slow service and how i ve been to other starbucks and blah blah blah this starbucks is big it s clean and the employees are nice they have a drive through which seems silly to me but i know people that like to use it all i know is that when i stop in there it seems like the employees move at glacial pace if you re stopping here plan to slow down a little or a lot depending on how fast you normally go other than that it s pretty nice and well it s close to my office

a decent spot to grab a cup of coffee or some food before going through the day this starbucks is part of the university of the sciences and will host a plethora of students it will get crowded and loud during the rush but slow down as people go to class staff are usually friendly depending on the day and service is quick for students this starbucks is similar to regular ones with the perks of being full of your classmates you can use your declining balance or devils dollars here a great spot to get quick tasty breakfast literally the best option for food in general on this campus that doesn t cost you real money for non students this location is nothing compared to a non university affiliated starbucks but you can always get the same options you can at other locations they will take cash and card and treat you no different there are usually many students here who will either be studying or eating so seating can be tricky deffinitely a go to when you visit the school phone wi fi does not work here for some reason there just doesn t seem to be service and nothing ever connects laptops do work here however this is a pretty nice locstion and typical location for a university better food here than most places and a nice atmosphere

the parking spots are right next to the drive through lane so getting in and out of the parking lot is a nightmare if you re not going through the drive through other than that the staff is friendly and the coffee is good as always

been here lots of times and they have never got my drink wrong except for today it wasn t exactly what i ordered but pretty close and actually was very drinkable i used to drink starbucks almost everyday but the cost is now prohibitive this is a good location no major issues
a typical starbucks however less stars due to the lack of comfortable cozy seating
its a starbucks they are all about the same but this one seem to have the world smallest parking lot and drive tho people are always trying to get in and out and its just a mess out their

used to be a favorite spot but recently the tea was watered down yhe the soy latte had an odd after taste the workers i am accustomed to it s a busy spot with limited seating adaptability is key don t rely on seating and chatting during busy hours cleanliness is ok and the noise level is average i guess you can say it s a hit or miss the location is conveniently located and there is outdoor seating a good place to wait while you car is getting work done

relative to other starbucks this one is generally okay nothing horrible nothing great the building doesn t look like a typical starbucks and the first time i went here i actually drove by it it s easy to find parking and the place is on the small side about maybe tables plus a few chairs inside and then an outside patio for when it s nicer out i ve always been able to find a table inside though the service is decent the line fluctuates between quite long and empty and the noise level fluctuates between quiet and very loud service is okay speed of drinks is okay food is okay the bathrooms were clean and they have free wifi generally a decent middle of the road starbucks but it s main advantage is its location right on near the kop mall

i have had a experience at this location tough to find your first time the staff are friendly but sometimes it seems they are a person down drinks are always as expected but slow on occasion the location is convenient and the centrally located
this location sucks because of the parking however the store inside is pretty big it looks very small from the outside

coffee is coffee to me so maybe not fair to judge but this location of starbucks just had too many people that seemed to be using this as their early morning place for hygiene a small line at the bathroom and the place was a little unkempt compared to the sb i went to about a mile away the previous morning this is a good location very convenient and did not have time for the extra distance

mostly average starbucks they are still a little slow which could be due to being a new location other than that it is your average expensive high calorie coffee joint so far it s kept pretty clean and the service is friendly basically it s an ice cream shop loaded with caffeine that no one looks down on me for having in the mornings thankfully it s located right next to a dentist so after i have my java chip and a bunch of pastries i can go next door and have all of my cavities filled

in the middle and late s this particular location was a caf paradiso i was more of a tea drinker than a coffee drinker then but every once in awhile i went to caf paradiso for their snacks baked goods and an occasional cup or two of coffee it was a nice place and i liked it a lot then one day when i was working and going to classes at a nearby university caf paradiso was gone it was converted to a starbucks and it s still a starbucks my caf paradiso was gone quel horreur so now it has continued to be a starbucks ever since then and it s not too much different than all the other starbucks locations some have outside seating and others don t have outside seating this one has outside seating the interior must have been remodeled because it s dark like everything is mahogany wood or made to look like that and depressing inside i m not sure what they were trying to accomplish with that but for me it doesn t work it doesn t feel inviting and i didn t want to stay there very long they offer typical starbucks stuff they were limited on the starbucks merchandise like cups and mugs they had food offerings like made up sandwiches and what seemed like limited baked goods parking is a problem now because the formerly free spaces along wydown are not free anymore they have an electronic pay station where you have to pay for the parking now i don t know why they changed it but it is now really inconvenient to park there now those electronic pay stations are a major pain in the ass because they take coins or cards and you have to put in your plate number in addition to paying with either the card or coins i hate them around the corner are the old fashioned parking meters which i prefer over that damn pay station so just beware of that and you will get a ticket if you don t pay i won t be back anytime soon

due to their south street location this starbucks is usually more crowded than dead it s not the biggest starbucks ever but there s space upstairs and the staff are fine the place is clean enough including the bathrooms at least when i was there it ll do if you have a hankering for starbucks otherwise i recommend hitting up a local coffee shop instead

this starbucks is in a hopping spot right in the middle of the philadelphia premium outlets so be prepared to wait in line for a while they do a pretty good job of keeping things moving but it is crowded they do have some outside seating which is nice all in all its your average starbucks

it s hit or miss on everything at times your drink is perfect sometimes it is half full or they didn t mix it right or something hit or miss sometimes they run out of straws or run out of cups or run out of sugar hit or miss

first visit while in this area slow filling mobile orders over minutes otherwise same expected high quality with pleasant barista ship i d say this location is difficult to access from pendleton pike with crowded parking lot i d bet drive their is its primary business and that may work better
service is okay can get very busy at time typical starbucks coffee it s okay it s overpriced hard to find a seat because so many people come in there and sit on the computer for hours

usually starbucks are just known as starbucks however we re unique in st louis and this location is often called the starbucks that used to be a bank it s pretty much your standard starbucks with a bit more seating than normal they have a few patio tables and a a decent amount of indoor seating you ll see an abnormal amount of students studying here i don t think there are many colleges nearby so i suppose they re high schoolers anyways i don t really go to starbucks very often but this one ain t so bad except if you re into drive throughs cause there ain t none

clean but mobile app ordered although confirmed did not go through at least on their end so caution when using mobile order they were good about it and it was nice there otherwise your typical starbucks
